title: Harden AG-UI event fidelity and local protocol metadata
goals: Keep AG-UI events stable for CopilotKit and future native UI.
Ensure runtime failures become RUN_ERROR events.
Preserve local_business.protocol metadata and namespaced local extensions.
non_goals: Do not introduce CopilotKit-specific concepts into the common protocol package.
acceptance: TEXT_MESSAGE, TOOL_CALL, STATE_DELTA, CUSTOM, RUN_FINISHED and RUN_ERROR paths are tested.
Unknown local extensions can be ignored by clients safely.
Common tests pass without requiring CopilotKit Runtime.
